layout.density: Compact enterprise admin UI using a 4px baseline grid.
layout.containerPolicy: Use horizontal and vertical containers everywhere; FlexibleWidth/FlexibleHeight/FillPortions first; fixed sizes only for small UI atoms.
layout.shapePolicy: Use 4px radius for controls and cards; up to 8px for larger framed panels.
layout.imageVisualPolicy: Use QuickChart for charts and inline SVG data URIs for icons/badges/micro-visuals.
layout.delegationPolicy: SharePoint galleries use indexed columns, simple filters, and StartsWith search patterns.
